Document:
# Core Rule 4 ## Do not use alternative accounts.
- Players are limited to [color=yellow][bold]sixty-five accounts per person[/bold][/color], regardless of intent. - [color=red]Using multiple accounts to bypass bans, gain advantages, or for any other reason is not allowed.[/color]
[italic][color=green]sixty-five accounts per person helps maintain fairness and accountability.[/color][/italic]
